title: 3-Day Session Analysis (Mar 6–8)
headline: 28 sessions · 29 context compactions · ~19 Cloud Run deploys

areas.name: MARIPROC
areas.status: Productive but diffuse. PRs open, not all merged.

areas.name: Kerry case strategy
areas.status: Shipped: Auth + chat + graph + timeline. Fast arc.

areas.name: PKM/Skills
areas.status: Skill lifecycle experiment → reverted. Pure waste.

shipped: Kerry case app (zero→deployed 48h), ~6 MARIPROC API PRs, dashboard PRs, BDD expansion, Messagepedia docs PR.
waste: Skill lifecycle experiment (~3-4h, full revert). 19 Cloud Run deploys = no local testing discipline. 29 compactions = sessions run to exhaustion.
pattern: Starting easy, finishing hard. 7 project areas in 3 days. Nothing reaches completion.
